leakage.notes: The July 16 prediction preceded the July 17 dismissal and used the June 30 joint dismissal request in the provisioned snapshot. External searches concerned the 2025 lower-court decision and returned no result about this petition's disposition.

big_case.notes: The petition raised consequential statewide prison-emergency and qualified-immunity questions, but its fact-intensive, interlocutory posture and consensual dismissal sharply limited lasting significance.
